hero.wanderer.name: Wandering Cultivator
home.profile.title: Character Profile
home.map_portal_hint: Choose your next trial across the realms.
home.echoes_travel_hint: Walk as legendary cultivators who already conquered the path — preview realms, skills, and fortune.
home.coming_soon: World map arrives in a future update.
home.story.empty: Venture forth to uncover the Dao.
item.sword.wood.name: Wood Sword
item.sword.wood.desc: A humble training blade carved from spirit oak.
item.sword.iron.name: Iron Sword
item.sword.iron.desc: Forged iron with a steady edge for wandering cultivators.
item.robe.novice.name: Novice Robe
item.robe.novice.desc: Simple cloth robes worn by sect initiates.
item.bracelet.copper.name: Copper Bracelet
item.bracelet.copper.desc: A copper band etched with faint protective runes.
item.ring.speed.name: Swift Ring
item.ring.speed.desc: Lightens the step of those who chase the wind.
item.spirit.jade.name: Jade Spirit Orb
item.spirit.jade.desc: A jade orb that resonates with inner spirit.
skill.sword.slash.name: Sword Slash
skill.sword.slash.desc: A swift arcing blade strike — the foundation of every sword cultivator.
skill.void.slash.name: Void Slash
skill.void.slash.desc: Tears a rift of void qi forward, shredding enemies in its path.
skill.flame.bolt.name: Flame Bolt
skill.flame.bolt.desc: Launches a searing bolt — flame intent made manifest.
skill.lightning.strike.name: Lightning Strike
skill.lightning.strike.desc: Calls thunder down the battlefield in a piercing line.
skill.time.slow.name: Time Slow
skill.time.slow.desc: Bends time around foes, pulling them into your rhythm.
skill.life.mend.name: Life Mend
skill.life.mend.desc: Draws life qi inward, mending wounds with gentle radiance.
skill.sword.slash.awakened.name: Sword Flash
skill.sword.slash.awakened.desc: Awakened sword intent — a blinding flash that cleaves all before you.
skill.void.slash.awakened.name: Void Fracture
skill.void.slash.awakened.desc: Fractures space itself; void collapses in a devastating wave.
skill.flame.bolt.awakened.name: Twin Flame Lotus
skill.flame.bolt.awakened.desc: Twin lotus flames bloom and detonate across a wide field.
skill.lightning.strike.awakened.name: Thunder Step
skill.lightning.strike.awakened.desc: Lightning chains between foes — thunder follows your will.
skill.time.slow.awakened.name: Time Domain
skill.time.slow.awakened.desc: A domain of slowed time; enemies move as if through amber.
skill.life.mend.awakened.desc: Spirit mend — a surge of life qi that floods the body with vitality.
skill.life.mend.awakened.name: Spirit Mend
skill.detail.unlock_base: Taught when you first channel {intent} intent — every cultivator learns this form.
skill.detail.unlock_awakened: Awakening ceremony at {realm} — {uses} uses and {xp} insight to ignite the true art.
skill.sword.slash.lore: The first form every sword disciple drills until muscle remembers the arc. Simple, fast, and the seed of every combo chain.
skill.sword.slash.awakened.lore: When sword intent awakens, the blade no longer cuts — it decides what may exist in front of you. Lin Feng's falling-star sects fell to this flash.
skill.void.slash.lore: Void cultivators tear a thin rift and walk the edge between being and nothing. The slash is narrow but merciless.
skill.void.slash.awakened.lore: Mo Xu fractured a village into memory and stepped through. Void Fracture collapses space — enemies are pulled into annihilation.
skill.flame.bolt.lore: A single flame seed launched on spirit breath. The foundation of every fire-path sect's ranged doctrine.
skill.flame.bolt.awakened.lore: Twin lotus flames mirror each other across the field — Yan Lei's tribulation art that scorched nine heavens.
skill.lightning.strike.lore: Thunder answered on the first call — a piercing line for cultivators who favor decisive strikes.
skill.lightning.strike.awakened.lore: Lightning learns your will and chains between foes. Few survive the second strike.
skill.time.slow.lore: Bends the rhythm of battle — enemies stumble while you move between heartbeats.
skill.time.slow.awakened.lore: A domain where only the cultivator's intent moves freely. Amber stillness for all else.
skill.life.mend.lore: The gentle art of drawing life qi inward — every sect teaches some variant to keep disciples alive on the path.
skill.life.mend.awakened.lore: Spirit Mend floods the meridians — a surge strong enough to reverse mortal wounds in an instant.
home.settings.title: Settings
awakening.title: Insight Awakened
combat.skills.pick_hint: Only skills not on other buttons — no duplicates.
combat.skills.swap_hint: Tap a slot, then pick a skill. Hold skill buttons in combat to channel repeatedly.
